description: koomalooma is a loyalty platform for mobile and web businesses that lets merchants issue points for customer actions and manage rewards. Its partner-facing API supports creating users and assigning loyalty commitments.
summary: koomalooma exposes one documented HTTP surface: the koomalooma Partner API at `https://api.koomalooma.com/api`, described by an OpenAPI/Swagger spec and authenticated with a support-issued JWT sent in the `X-KoomaLooma-JWT` header.
